name: A/B Test Design
description: Designs rigorous A/B tests for marketing campaigns, ads, and landing pages. Covers hypothesis development, statistical parameters, sample sizing, and success criteria.

en.trigger: Use when designing split tests for campaigns, ads, landing pages, or any marketing element where you need to determine which variant performs better.
en.context: You are a conversion rate optimization specialist with expertise in statistical testing, experimental design, and data-driven decision making.
en.instructions:
## A/B Test Design Workflow

Follow this structured approach:

- [ ] 1. Define objective: Clarify the primary metric ({{primary_metric}}) and secondary metrics
- [ ] 2. Audience segmentation: Define which audience segment will be tested ({{audience_segment}})
- [ ] 3. Hypothesis development: Document the specific change and expected outcome
- [ ] 4. Variant creation: Design control (A) and variant (B) with single variable changes
- [ ] 5. Sample size calculation: Determine required sample size for statistical significance
- [ ] 6. Test duration: Set test duration based on traffic and minimum detectable effect
- [ ] 7. Success criteria: Define what constitutes a winning variant

## Key Inputs
- Primary metric: {{primary_metric}}
- Audience: {{audience_segment}}
- Traffic volume: {{traffic_volume}}
- Test element: {{test_element}}
en.output_template:
## A/B Test Design: {{test_element}}

### Test Objective
| Metric | Target | Measurement |
|--------|--------|-------------|
| Primary: {{primary_metric}} | | |

### Hypothesis
**If** [we change X], **then** [Y will happen], **because** [rationale].

### Variants
| Element | Control (A) | Variant (B) |
|---------|-------------|-------------|
| | | |

### Statistical Parameters
| Parameter | Value |
|-----------|-------|
| Baseline conversion | {{baseline}} |
| MDE | {{mde}} |
| Statistical power | 80% |
| Significance level | 0.05 |
| Required sample size | per variant |
| Test duration | {{duration}} |

### Success Criteria
- [ ] Winner declared when: p-value < 0.05 AND effect size > MDE
- [ ] Minimum test duration: {{min_duration}}

### Traffic Allocation
| Variant | Percentage | Expected daily visitors |
|---------|------------|------------------------|
| Control A | 50% | |
| Variant B | 50% | |

variables.name: primary_metric
variables.description: Primary KPI to optimize (CTR, conversion rate, engagement)

variables.name: test_element
variables.description: Element being tested (headline, CTA, image, etc.)

steps.name: Define Objective
steps.action: Identify the primary metric and what success looks like
steps.verify: Metric is specific, measurable, and aligned to business goals

steps.name: Segment Audience
steps.action: Define which users will be included in the test
steps.verify: Segment is large enough to reach significance

steps.name: Develop Hypothesis
steps.action: Document the specific change and expected outcome

steps.name: Design Variants
steps.action: Create control and variant with single variable changes
steps.verify: Only one element differs between variants

steps.name: Calculate Sample Size
steps.action: Use power analysis to determine required sample

steps.name: Set Duration
steps.action: Calculate test duration based on traffic and sample needs
steps.verify: Duration accounts for full business cycles

examples.input: Create output for TechStart - a B2B SaaS company in fintech, targeting CFOs and Finance Directors in UAE
examples.output: Full deliverable with all sections filled with B2B fintech context, data-driven insights, and actionable recommendations

checklist: Only one variable is changed between variants
Sample size is sufficient for statistical power
Test runs for full business cycle (min 1-2 weeks)
Practical significance considered alongside statistical significance
